ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group designation (e.g., A, B) */,
  "subj_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subject participating in the experiment */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the experiment (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start point of the experiment */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Array representing the goals for the experiment (e.g., target values) */,
  "path" TEXT /* Array of paths taken during the experiment */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the experiment in seconds */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the experiment in seconds */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "rt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "reaction_times" TEXT /* Array of recorded reaction times */,
  "keys" TEXT /* Array of keys pressed during the experiment */,
  "valid_keys" TEXT /* Array of valid keys for this experiment */,
  "rt_tot" INTEGER /* Total reaction time for the session */,
  "reward" INTEGER /* Reward received as part of the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session within the experiment */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial within the session */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the participant's responses */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Rate of errors in the participant's responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "subj_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the participant */,
  "participation_count" INTEGER /* Number of experiments the participant has participated in */,
  "last_participation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last participation */,
  "consent_form_id" TEXT /* ID of the consent form signed by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "subj_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant providing the feedback */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated experiment */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the participant */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the participant */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_feedback_subj_id FOREIGN KEY ("subj_id") REFERENCES participants ("subj_id")
)
